overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit urban plaza at night, then sitting on a bench while the camera orbits around them. The scene features futuristic architecture, holographic advertisements, and a large cherry blossom tree display.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a neon-lit urban plaza at night, passing by concrete benches where NPCs are seated. The environment features towering buildings with bright holographic advertisements and a large glowing cherry blossom tree display visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered seating area with holographic tree view

agents.ego_description: seated on bench, interacting with a handheld device and occasionally looking around at the surroundings

segments.scene_description: The character sits on a concrete bench and interacts with a handheld device while the camera slowly orbits around them. The holographic cherry blossom tree remains visible in the background, and other NPCs can be seen seated on nearby benches in this covered urban seating area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban plaza that transitions from a steady forward walk into a slow, orbiting close-up. It begins with the character navigating the plaza past concrete benches and NPCs, moving toward a horizon dominated by towering buildings and a glowing holographic cherry blossom tree. As the character reaches a seating area, the forward momentum shifts into a seated position where they begin interacting with a handheld device. The camera then expands its perspective by slowly orbiting around the character, keeping the luminous cherry blossom display and other seated NPCs as a constant, shimmering backdrop.
